summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TratorShop agricultural machinery marketplace MVP. All critical features tested successfully.

minor_issues.issue: Test endpoint returned 405 instead of 401 - this is a test issue, not API issue (should be POST, not GET)
Logo click had overlay interception issue on search page
minor_issues.note: Common React dropdown overlay issue, does not affect core functionality

passed_tests: Categories API returns all 4 categories (tratores, implementos, colheitadeiras, pecas)
Cities API returns MS cities list
Listings API returns empty list as expected
Featured listings API returns empty array as expected
Auth endpoints properly return 401 without authentication
Admin endpoints properly return 401 without authentication
Homepage loads with hero section, search bar, categories, and CTA
Category cards display and navigate correctly
Navigation menu complete with all 4 category links
Login button redirects to Google OAuth correctly
Search page loads and displays filters properly
City dropdown shows all MS cities
Search input functionality works with query parameters
Login page shows Google OAuth integration properly
